data.title: Teva Pharmaceutical Indus Unusual Options Activity
Ultragenyx Is Uniquely Positioned In Long Term, Remains On JPMorgan's Focus List
data.description: JP Morgan sees strong upside for Ultragenyx, citing setrusumab trial progress and pipeline growth, raising the price target to $117.

data.title: Soleno Shares Are Up Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: SLNO) shares are trading higher Thursday after the company announced it secured FDA approval for its first commercial drug, Vykat XR (diazoxide choline) extended-release tablets.

data.title: Nvidia Faces Fresh China Setback As Chip Shortages And Sanctions Disrupt Supply
data.description: Chinese semiconductor companies face Nvidia chip crisis amid US sanctions, raw material policy changes, and shipping disruptions. H3C prioritizes orders for long-term customers. China restricts Nvidia's tailor-made chip due to energy efficiency rules.

data.title: US Department of Health And Human Services Aligns With Trump's Executive Order, To Cut 10K Jobs, Save $1.8 Billion
data.description: HHS plans a major restructuring, cutting jobs, consolidating divisions, and shifting pandemic research priorities while launching a new health agency.
